zh.lifeSummary: 當Mehitable Morrison於1804年出生在美國緬因州約克利默里克時，她的父親Samuel Morrison43歲，母親Margaret Webber43歲。她於1824年與Royal B. Coolbroth在美國緬因州約克利默里克結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她在美國緬因州沃爾多貝爾法斯特住了大約10年且於1880年住在美國緬因州阿盧斯圖可伊斯頓。她去世於1879年享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mehitable Morrison于1804年出生在美国缅因州約克利默里克时，她的父亲Samuel Morrison43岁，母亲Margaret Webber43岁。她于1824年与Royal B. Coolbroth在美国缅因州約克利默里克结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她在美国缅因州沃爾多貝爾法斯特住了大约10年且于1880年住在美国缅因州阿盧斯圖可伊斯頓。她去世于1879年享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Morrison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: from Ó Muirgheasáin ‘descendant of Muirgheasán’, a diminutive of Muirgheas, a personal name meaning ‘sea valor’.
Scottish: from Gaelic Mac Moireasdain ‘son of Moireasdan’, a personal name cognate with Irish Muirgheasán’ (see 1 above).
Scottish and English: patronymic from the personal name   Morris  .

variants.name: Morson
meanings: English, Scottish and Irish: shortened form of   Morrison  .
English: sometimes a variant of Moorsom, a habitational name from Moorsholm in North Yorkshire. The placename derives from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + hūsum, dative plural form of hūs ‘house’.

variants.name: Morris
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

variants.name: McCorriston
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): probably from Mac Thoireasdain ‘son of Tòireasdan or Tòrasdan’, a Gaelicized form of the Old Norse name Thórrsteinn ‘thunder stone’. It may also be from a lenited form of Gaelic Mac Moireasdain ‘son of Moireasdan’; see Morrison .

historicEvents.description: Lewis and Clark set out from St. Louis, MO to explore the West.

historicEvents.title: Whitehead Light
historicEvents.description: In 1804, President Thomas Jefferson authorized the creation of a light station on Whitehead Island. The light house went into service by 1807. It is the third-oldest light house in Maine. Whitehead Light still exists as the private property of Pine Island Camp, a non-profit organization.

historicEvents.title: The Crimes Act
historicEvents.description: The Crimes Act was made to provide a clearer punishment of certain crimes against the United States. Part of it includes: Changing the maximum sentence of imprisonment to be increased from seven to ten years and changing the maximum fine from $5,000 to $10,000.
Historical Boundaries: 1827: Waldo, Maine, United States
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.
Historical Boundaries: 1851: Aroostook, Maine, United States
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

historicEvents.title: The Battle at Gettysburg
historicEvents.description: The Battle of Gettysburg involved the largest number of casualties of the entire Civil war and is often described as the war's turning point. Between 46,000 and 51,000 soldiers lost their lives during the three-day Battle. To honor the fallen soldiers, President Abraham Lincoln read his historic Gettysburg Address and helped those listening by redefining the purpose of the war.

en.lifeSummary: When Mehitable Morrison was born in 1804, in Limerick, York, Maine, United States, her father, Samuel Morrison, was 43 and her mother, Margaret Webber, was 43. She married Royal B. Coolbroth in 1824, in Limerick, York, Maine, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She lived in Belfast, Waldo, Maine, United States for about 10 years and Easton, Aroostook, Maine, United States in 1880. She died in 1879, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mehitable Morrison est née en 1804, à Limerick, York, Maine, États-Unis, son père, Samuel Morrison, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Margaret Webber, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Royal B. Coolbroth en 1824, à Limerick, York, Maine, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle a vécu à Belfast, Waldo, Maine, États-Unis pendant environ 10 ans et à Easton, Aroostook, Maine, États-Unis en 1880. Elle est décédée en 1879, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, United S: New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten
de.lifeSummary: Als Mehitable Morrison 1804 in Limerick, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Samuel Morrison 43 und ihre Mutter Margaret Webber 43. Sie hat 1824 in Limerick, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten Royal B. Coolbroth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie hat ungefähr 10 Jahre lang in Belfast, Waldo, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt, und 1880 hat sie in Easton, Aroostook, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb 1879 im Alter von 75 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mehitable Morrison è nata il nel 1804 nel Limerick, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Samuel Morrison, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Margaret Webber, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Royal B. Coolbroth nel 1824, nel Limerick, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Belfast, Waldo, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America per circa 10 anni e nel Easton, Aroostook, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1880. Morì nel 1879, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mehitable Morrisonが1804年にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークリメリックで生まれた時，父Samuel Morrisonは43歳，母Margaret Webberは43歳であった。1824年にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークリメリックでRoyal B. Coolbrothと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はアメリカ合衆国メイン州ワルドベルファストに約10年間，1880年にはアメリカ合衆国メイン州アルーストオクエアストンに住んでいた。彼女は1879年に75歳で死去した。

ko.New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, United S: 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 뉴 라임릭
ko.lifeSummary: Mehitable Morrison(이)가 1804년 미국 메인 주 요르크 라임릭에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Samuel Morrison(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Webber(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1824년 미국 메인 주 요르크 라임릭에서 Royal B. Coolbroth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 미국 메인 주 월도 벨파스트에서 약 10년, 1880년도에 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 이스트에서 살았다. 그녀는 1879년 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Royal B. Coolbroth em 1824, em Limerick, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. ru.New Limerick, Aroostook, Maine, United S: ню лимирикк, арустук, Мэн, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mehitable Morrison родилась в 1804 г. в местности лимирикк, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Samuel Morrison было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Webber, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Royal B. Coolbroth в 1824 г. в местности лимирикк, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она жила в местности белфаст, валдо, Мэн, Соединенные штаты около 10 лет и в местности эастон, арустук, Мэн, Соединенные штаты в 1880 году. Она умерла в 1879 г. в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mehitable Morrison nació en 1804, en Limerick, York, Maine, Estados Unidos, su papá, Samuel Morrison, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Margaret Webber, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Royal B. Coolbroth en 1824, en Limerick, York, Maine, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Belfast, Waldo, Maine, Estados Unidos durante unos 10 años y en Easton, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos en 1880. Murió en 1879, a la edad de 75 años.
